initial_request_score.label: mostly_supported

evidence.quote: Protein kinases are frequently dysregulated and/or mutated in cancer and represent essential targets for therapy.
Optimized assays were initially evaluated in 16 patient derived xenograft models (PDX)... reapplied to low quantities of proteins typical of yields from core needle biopsies of human cancers.
In this study we developed a kinase inhibitor pulldown assay (KiP) with clinically relevant inhibitors that is optimized for microgram protein yields typical for needle core biopsy samples.

issues.reason: Text states 'From these analyses, an optimized single-shot parallel reaction monitoring (PRM) method was developed... The initial prototype targeting 100 kinases'. The 100-kinase panel was an outcome of optimization ('From these analyses'), not strictly defined as the initial request goal before the study, though it is the study's target.

initial_request_score.fix_suggestion: Rephrase quantifiable_goal to reflect that the 100-kinase panel was developed/optimized during the study based on initial analyses, rather than a pre-defined initial request constraint.

evidence.quote: We synthesized our own ECH Sepharose 4B by conjugating 6-Aminohexanoic acid (Sigma) to cyanogen bromide (CNBr)-activated Sepharose 4B
Each drug was dissolved in 50% DMF/EtOH and added to the conditioned beads... allowed to react overnight at 4 °C
20-200 µg of lysates were mixed with 10 µL of kinobeads... for 1 h at 4 °C
washed two-times with 400 µL buffer containing 50 mM HEPES (pH 7.5), 600 mM NaCl... with 0.5% Triton X-100
2.5 µg of trypsin was then directly added to the beads and bicarbonate mixture and digested overnight at 37 °C
processed using the HiPPR Detergent Removal Kit (Thermo)
Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer coupled with EASY-nLC™ 1200 system
gradient of 5–28% mobile phase B... at a flow rate of 750 nL/min for 75 min
Proteome Discoverer (PD version 2.1; Thermo Fisher Scientific)... Mascot search engine (2.5.1)
PSM validation was performed with Percolator and filtered to 5% FDR
Up to six strongest product ions were used to calculate peptide area... manually adjusted in Skyline
narrowing down to 2–4 peptides per gene product
For PRM scan... resolution of 30,000... normalized collision energy of 30%
Scan windows were set to 4 min for each peptide
Skyline(version 21.2.0.425)
Protein levels were median normalized and log transformed
applied KiP to 16 breast cancer xenografts... 50 µg of protein lysate from PDX tumors
Hierarchical clustering using kinases measured by PRM separates tumors into groups corresponding primarily to basal and luminal PAM50 subtypes
16 luminal and 21 ERBB2+(HER2) samples were analyzed
K-means clustering of the samples yielded 3 subgroups: one Luminal and two HER2 groups
Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer... coupled with Evosep One liquid chromatography system
30 samples per day method from Evosep One (44 min gradient)

step_scores.label: mostly_supported

evidence.quote: ran a mixture of Luminal PDX samples in 18 replicates
average coefficient of variance (CV) of 9.28% (2.2-27.2%) for 80 peptides

issues.reason: Text cites 'Additional file 1: Figure S3' for the CV data, but JSON step does not include this reference.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Add citation to Additional file 1: Figure S3 in the references field.

success_verification_score.label: mostly_supported

evidence.quote: KiP-PRM classifies and subtypes breast cancer xenografts... developed an Internal Standard Triggered-Parallel Reaction Monitoring (ISPRM) assay
optimized a one hundred kinase targeted panel
average coefficient of variance (CV) of 9.28%

issues.reason: Text states samples 'clustered by subtype' and 'consistent with previous... studies', but does not explicitly quantify subtyping accuracy as 100%.

success_verification_score.fix_suggestion: Change subtyping_accuracy value to reflect qualitative clustering success (e.g., 'Consistent clustering') rather than a specific '100%' metric not found in text.
